note: SF Outside Malaysia 2120 rebuilt with non-overlapping regions and conservative complete-footprint tile use. Regions: 1 safe transit hub, 2 chokepoints, 3 government-tech, 4 commercial mega-district, 5 residential arcology, 6 industrial smart port, 7 hidden service routes, 8 encounter zones, 9 heritage-tech market, 10 East Malaysia rainforest dome.

parameters: Safe transit hub. District routes radiate outward without overlapping region zones.
Malaysia 2120 navigation anchor: hover-rail, skybridge, and fast-travel unlock.
KL skyline anchor. Built as two complete 4x11 tower footprints with full light columns and a skybridge band.
No partial facade or one-tile tower fragment is used.
Civic plaza for crescent/star-inspired holographic sculpture. Use event graphics/animation here if desired.
Safe zone region 1, clear walkable staging area.
Standalone government-tech zone, region 3. Clean green-resin/civic floor with terminals and access control.
Not nested inside any other gameplay zone.
Standalone commercial zone, region 4. Twin towers, signs, street lights, and elevated route access.
Use for corporate NPCs and neon shop hooks.
Standalone heritage-tech zone, region 9. Malay, Chinese, and Indian motifs should be implemented as holographic stalls/sign events.
No food-stall composite sprites are placed; signage is standalone.
Standalone residential arcology, region 5. Rooftop garden and rain capture route hooks.
Good safe social side-quest block.
Standalone smart-port zone, region 6. AI cargo systems, machine terminals, and autonomous ship access.
No single-tile vehicle/container fragments.
Standalone East Malaysia sector, region 10. Sabah/Sarawak rainforest biodome with suspended walkway hooks.
Plants are standalone B-sheet plant tiles only.
Connector chokepoint region 2 between night market and central hub.
Connector chokepoint region 2 between central hub and commercial district.
Connector chokepoint region 2 over the sea channel to East Malaysia sector.
Connector chokepoint region 2 leading into industrial port.
Hidden service route, region 7. Runs along the rainwater channel behind the west districts.
Hidden service route, region 7. Back edge of the rainforest dome for stealth or treasure.
Encounter zone region 8. Market-adjacent alley, separate from the market district.
Encounter zone region 8. Port-side drone yard outside the port district.
Standalone machine device tile. Route info and fast-travel menu hook.
Standalone digital signage tile. Night-market job board and cultural quest hooks.
Standalone machine device tile. AI port manifest, drone permits, and cargo puzzle hook.
Safe rest/info point inside the East Malaysia dome sector.
Atmosphere hook: rainy neon dusk transitioning to vibrant night, with subtle fog and sign flicker.
Animation hook: moving cyan/magenta lane lights over the sea skybridge and dome approach.
